calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-18-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Valerie Papale. Petitioner, Monica Betty Kuan was sworn and examined. The Court grants the Decree changing Petitioner's name to Monique Betty Kwan. Decree signed in open court.
